name: Mongols New Player Guide
author: Shaada
reasoning: The highest-rated Mongol guide on aoe4guides, written for newer players: an aggressive but forgiving plan built around Mongol mobility and early pressure without the all-in risk of a pure tower rush.

notes: If can't tower rush, a fast pasture opening is okay
Place town center by wood , 5 villager mongols on nearest trees with the ger , 1 villager mongols makes ovoo
After trees is finished, 3 villager mongols go to tree by town center , other 2 villager mongols to food . repair barracks @ ovoo .
Double produce spearman 1 and go across the map with a villager mongols to outpost opponent's gold (see video for variants)
Train 3 more spearman 1 (single + double production) and rally them across the map as well
Once enough wood for the 5 spearman 1 + outpost , re-macro to food / gold and age up with 6 villager mongols on deer stones
Leave 5 on food and 4 on gold as you age up. deer stones villager mongols will go back to food once done with 1 to gold .
Rally to wood until 7 total, then back to food to 12. Get wheelbarrow when you can.
Either all in in Feudal or re-arrange villager mongols and go up to Castle with kurultai !
Build stable , upgrade arrow slits on outpost , and upgrade spearman 1
Train keshik 2 (1x double production) non-stop. Add archery range and train archer 2 non-stop (double production when possible).
Send 5 villager mongols to deer and research survival techniques (add an outpost when able)
Add blacksmith when able and research steeled arrow + iron undermesh . Slowly add pasture while being aggressive.
